title: Puri District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Junior Typist, Junior Clerk cum Copyist and More Posts
post_name: Junior Typist, Junior Clerk cum-Copyist and More
short_info: Puri District Court Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the Puri District Court Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for women and reserved categories as per provisions of the Act, Rules, Orders or Instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma, Matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board, Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E.
qualification.details: Junior Typist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute; minimum speed of 40 words per minute in Typewriting through computer system. Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute. Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board; Revenue Inspector Training from recognized institute. General Qualification: Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. Standard.

salary_details.junior typist: Rs.19,900/- - 63,200/- under Level-4 of the Pay Matrix (O.R.S.P. Rules, 2017)
salary_details.junior clerk-cum-copyist: Rs.19,900/- - 63,200/- under Level-4 of the Pay Matrix (O.R.S.P. Rules, 2017)
salary_details.salaried amin: Rs.21,700/- - 69,100/- under Level-5 of the Pay Matrix (O.R.S.P. Rules, 2017)

selection_process: Written Test Type Writing Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Viva-Voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Puri District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https:// puri.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
